channel.title: Tenside Surfactants Detergents
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Tenside Surfactants Detergents

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: Amino acid Gemini surfactants: a review on their synthesis, properties and applications
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2649

item.title: Study on the synthesis and properties of Gemini surfactant with ester spacers
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2637

item.title: Branched-chain anionic surfactants with same hydrophobic tail architecture: effects of hydrophilic headgroups
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2639

item.title: Comparative study of organic co-solvents on micellar and surface behavior of ionic surfactants: effects of DMSO, acetonitrile, and 1-propanol
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2642

item.title: Polycarbinol-siloxane surfactants: synthesis, characterization, fire suppression evaluation and foaming-defoaming properties
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2646

item.title: Study of poly (acrylamide/sodium alpha-olefin sulfonate/tea saponin)-polyhedrol oligomerie silsesquioxan (POSS) nanomaterial (FAP)
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2629

item.title: Exploring the interactions in the mixtures of cationic Gemini and biologically significant anionic surfactant sodium cholate in presence of drug proponolol hydrochloride
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2648

item.title: Eberconazole nitrate–loaded spanlastics: nanocarriers for topical delivery system
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2644

item.title: Coconut oil refinery waste utilization in sustainable development of biodegradable betaine surfactant
item.description: Article by Rahul P. Kedar, Yogeshsing N. Rajput, Chetan D. Girase, Ravindra D. Kulkarni DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2627
